suggestion_reasons.Narrative Arc & 'Why Now' Urgency: Scoring highest of all criteria and the user explicitly called out narrative urgency as the reason they'd send the rubric-guided draft — kept exactly as-is.
suggestion_reasons.Standalone-Yet-Connected Aim Architectur: All three drafts scored low because these were significance sections with no explicit aims — the criterion is structurally misapplied to this writing type and needs a scope note clarifying it applies to Specific Aims sections, not Significance, so it stops penalizing valid significance-only passages.
suggestion_reasons.Strategic Framing of Preliminary Work &: The user's comment that 'if we can demonstrate' is exactly the right register confirms the rubric-guided draft's 'leaves room to fund' framing worked — but the generic draft's 'The tools are ready' language nearly passed because the criterion doesn't explicitly flag tool-readiness claims as a risk; added a dimension to name this pattern directly.
suggestion_reasons.Cross-Disciplinary Accessibility: Scoring well and consistent with the user's stated appreciation for the interdisciplinary framing in the rubric-guided draft — kept exactly as-is.
suggestion_reasons.Earned Authority \u2014 Claims Grounded,: The largest score gap of any criterion (5 vs. 2 vs. 3) and the user's core objection to the generic draft ('The tools are ready. The population is waiting.' = empty confidence) — kept exactly as-is because it is clearly the most differentiating criterion in the rubric.
suggestion_reasons.Paragraph Closing Resolution: The user's feedback repeatedly centers on whether closings land as declarative resolutions or leave the reader 'hovering' — this pattern appears in the conversation history, in the user's ranking commentary ('the final line lands like a conclusion you feel, not just read'), and is named in coaching notes as the primary iteration point, but no existing criterion captures it. Adding it now because no amount of rewording the existing criteria would surface this as a scoreable, discrete quality.
